blocks.text: Hovland sits T25 six shots off Sungjae Im's pace, Reitan T41 — both Norwegians at -1 after two rounds. Weekend rounds at Innisbrook need to be something special to contend.
♟️ 20:00 — Christiansen in Chess960 Survival Round 2, Honduras — Norway's man in a brutal elimination format
What a CL week: Barcelona torched Newcastle 7-2, Liverpool eased past Galatasaray 4-0. The PL and La Liga weekend now resumes with form guides rewritten and stakes raised.
